title: Please help me get this straight
display_title: Please help me get this straight
wikitext:
[]: Please help me get this straight             Quote Post by nr4mg » Tue Sep 23, 2008 9:43 pm I have the whole series of manga of EVA:Angelic days, is that series the same as Girlfriend of steel series or not? Second question is Does anyone know of a english sub girlfriend of steel 2? I have beaten the first one and have the secondin Japanese but..well i cant read it...Is there a hack file to make it sub or a version thats subbed if so where can I get my hands on it? What happened to Zuggy i loved him anyone know how to contact him?

[]: Re: Please help me get this straight             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Sep 24, 2008 7:21 am nr4mg wrote: I have the whole series of manga of EVA:Angelic days, is that series the same as Girlfriend of steel series or not?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 24, 2008 11:31 am Yes, it's the same. Eva wiki has more info about it if you're interested: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Girlfriend_of_Steel_2 http://evageeks.org/FGP/Girlfriend_of_Steel_2_%28manga%29 Is there a hack file to make it sub or a version thats subbed

[]:             Quote Post by nr4mg » Wed Sep 24, 2008 2:35 pm I wanted to find out if he ever met mana again... plus mana was never menchened in the manga, so the stories seemed completly different Thankyou for your answers Does anyone know how to contact him, I just want to talk and get some of his art permissions and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 24, 2008 3:59 pm Check yr pms

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 24, 2008 5:58 pm With the first Girlfriend of Steel game? Shinji is able to meet Mana in two of the three endings, yes.

[]:             Quote Post by nr4mg » Thu Sep 25, 2008 9:06 am Mr. Tines wrote: Check yr pms

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Sep 26, 2008 1:02 pm Zuggy, sadly, did not love us, nor could he break his addiction to tinfoil hattery.
